name: Easy Shrimp Etouffee
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rotel tomatoes (canned tomato and green chiles)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, melt margarine over medium heat.
2. Add onions, bell pepper, celery, and tomatoes. Cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, parsley, garlic, and shrimp. Mix well.
4. Cover the pot and cook on low for 20-25 minutes or high for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add cream of mushroom soup and green onion tops. Cook an additional 10 minutes until thickened.
6. Serve over hot rice.
